questions: Is the patient unresponsive and not breathing normally (or only gasping)? (Yes/No)
Is a definite pulse present within 10 seconds? (Yes/No)
What rhythm is identified by the AED/defibrillator? (Shockable - VT/VF, or Not Shockable - Asystole/PEA)
Is the patient in cardiac arrest (no pulse)? (Yes/No)
What is the rhythm identified by the monitor/defibrillator? (Shockable - VT/VF, or Not Shockable - Asystole/PEA)
